ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* Whitepaper URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain_explorer_url" TEXT /* Blockchain explorer URL of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" INTEGER /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the data belongs to */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "google_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Google Trends entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the data belongs to */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date of the Google Trends data */,
  "trend_value" INTEGER /* Google Trends value for the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "category" TEXT /* Google Trends category (e.g., finance, technology, etc.) */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Google Trends topic (e.g., cryptocurrency, blockchain, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_google_trends_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reddit_subscribers" (
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Reddit subscriber entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the data belongs to */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date of the Reddit subscriber data */,
  "subscribers" INTEGER /* Number of Reddit subscribers for the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "subreddit_name" TEXT /* Subreddit name */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the subreddit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscriber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reddit_subscribers_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twitter_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Twitter mention entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the data belongs to */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date of the Twitter mention data */,
  "mentions" INTEGER /* Number of Twitter mentions for the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "username" TEXT /* Twitter username of the user who made the mention */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Tweet text */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the tweet */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_twitter_mentions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, investor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* Profile picture URL of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the investment */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency invested in */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount invested */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "local_currency" TEXT /* Local currency of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the alert is for */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price alert, volume alert, etc.) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency the analysis is for */,
  "dates" TEXT /* Date of the market analysis */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Market analysis for the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., technical analysis, fundamental analysis, etc.) */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
